name: IdsEdwMbrPrmcyDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH SourceData AS (SELECT MBR_SK, INDV_BE_KEY, PRI_IN, GRP_SK, MBR_BRTH_DT, MBR_GNDR_CD, LAST_UPDT_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_CAE_MBR_PRMCY), CTE_MAIN AS (SELECT MBR_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, INDV_BE_KEY, PRI_IN, GRP_SK, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), MBR_BRTH_DT, 112), 1, 4) + '-' + SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), MBR_BRTH_DT, 112), 5, 2) + '-' + SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), MBR_BRTH_DT, 112), 7, 2) AS MBR_BRTH_DT, MBR_GNDR_CD, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), LAST_UPDT_DT, 112), 1, 4) + '-' + SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), LAST_UPDT_DT, 112), 5, 2) + '-' + SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), LAST_UPDT_DT, 112), 7, 2) AS LAST_UPDT_DT FROM SourceData WHERE MBR_SK <> 0 AND MBR_SK <> 1), CTE_UNK AS (SELECT 0 AS MBR_SK, 'UNK' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 'UNK' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS INDV_BE_KEY, 'U' AS PRI_IN, 0 AS GRP_SK, '1753-01-01' AS MBR_BRTH_DT, 'U' AS MBR_GNDR_CD, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_DT), CTE_NA AS (SELECT 1 AS MBR_SK, 'NA' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 'NA' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS INDV_BE_KEY, 'X' AS PRI_IN, 1 AS GRP_SK, '1753-01-01' AS MBR_BRTH_DT, 'X' AS MBR_GNDR_CD, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_DT) SELECT * FROM CTE_MAIN UNION ALL SELECT * FROM CTE_UNK UNION ALL SELECT * FROM CTE_NA

Job Name: IdsEdwMbrPrmcyDExtr

Write MBR_PRMCY_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwMbrPrmcyLoad.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
